Bus Timings

Complete Guide to Al Mizhar 1 Bus Stop in Dubai

March 8, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Mizhar 1, Arabian Center Bus Stop serves as a significant transit point within the Al Mizhar neighborhood of Dubai. Conveniently situated near key amenities and services, this bus stop connects passengers to a variety of destinations across the city. Its strategic location provides easy access to shopping centers, dining options, and healthcare facilities, making it an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation network.

Address

Al Mizhar 1 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Situated in the bustling Al Mizhar area, the Al Mizhar 1, Arabian Center Bus Stop is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation system. This strategically located stop is well-connected with multiple bus routes, ensuring seamless travel to various parts of the city. Its close proximity to shopping centers, dining options, and essential services enhances its significance for both daily commuters and visitors exploring the vibrant Al Mizhar neighborhood.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Mizhar 1, Arabian Center Bus Stop is served by the F05 bus route, providing frequent departures throughout the day. Below is the schedule for the F05 route:

Bus Route Destination Timings
F05 Mizhar 6:51 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 6:54 PM
F05 Mizhar 7:21 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 7:24 PM
F05 Mizhar 7:51 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 7:54 PM
F05 Mizhar 8:21 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 8:25 PM
F05 Mizhar 8:50 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 9:29 PM
F05 Mizhar 9:40 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 10:29 PM
F05 Mizhar 10:40 PM
F05 Rashidiya MS 11:29 PM
F05 Mizhar 11:40 PM
F05 Mizhar 12:41 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 4:57 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 5:32 AM
F05 Mizhar 6:18 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 6:19 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 7:07 AM
F05 Mizhar 7:11 AM
F05 Mizhar 7:59 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 8:01 AM
F05 Rashidiya MS 8:31 AM

Bus Route Details

  • F05 Route: This route connects Al Mizhar with Rashidiya MS and various key areas across Dubai. Buses start operating from 6:51 PM and continue until 8:31 AM the following day, with intervals throughout the day. The F05 route provides essential connectivity for commuters traveling between Al Mizhar and Rashidiya MS, ensuring efficient travel across the city.

Nearby Stops

  1. Mushrif, Eppco 2(271m): 11, 16

  2. Mushrif, Eppco 1(317m): 11, 16

The Al Mizhar 1, Arabian Center Bus Stop offers a crucial link within Dubai’s extensive public transportation network. Its central location near various amenities, including restaurants, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities, makes it an important transit point for both locals and visitors. The well-connected bus routes ensure easy access to key destinations, providing a convenient and efficient travel option in the Al Mizhar area.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 8, 2026.
